title: Toggle
description: A two-state button that can be toggled on or off. Supports multiple variants, sizes, and can be used as toolbar controls.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the Radix UI toggle primitive and class-variance-authority.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the toggle component code.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: Basic toggle buttons for text formatting.

examples.title: Outline
examples.description: variant="outline" — bordered toggle with transparent background.

examples.title: Ghost
examples.description: variant="ghost" — muted text, subtle background on hover and press.

examples.title: Secondary
examples.description: variant="secondary" — uses the secondary color token for pressed state.

examples.title: Destructive
examples.description: variant="destructive" — red-toned toggle for mute or delete-style actions.

examples.title: Link
examples.description: variant="link" — appears as an underlined text toggle.

examples.title: Small
examples.description: size="sm" — compact toggle for toolbar use.

examples.title: Large
examples.description: size="lg" — larger toggle for prominent controls.

examples.title: With Text
examples.description: A toggle that includes both an icon and a text label.

examples.title: Toolbar
examples.description: Toggles grouped as an alignment toolbar.

examples.title: Disabled
examples.description: Toggles in a disabled state, both off and on.
